personalised_tips.tip: The perfect routine for oily skin: ClearSkin Face Wash (morning & evening) → SkinBalance Toner → HydraGlow Vitamin C Serum (morning only) → AquaBoost Moisturiser (lightweight layer) → SunShield SPF 50+ (every morning). At night, swap the serum for the ClearDerm Spot Treatment on any blemishes.

Morning: HydraGlow Vitamin C Serum → AquaBoost Moisturiser → SunShield SPF 50+. Evening: AquaBoost Moisturiser → RetinolRenew Night Cream (start 2–3 nights per week). This combination addresses fine lines, hyperpigmentation, and loss of firmness.

For a long-lasting makeup look: start with a moisturised skin base → apply VelvetMatte Foundation → conceal with HideAway Concealer → set with GlowSetter Setting Powder focusing on T-zone → finish with DramaLash Mascara for defined lashes.

For damaged or frizzy hair: wash with a gentle shampoo → while hair is wet, apply RepairRich Hair Mask and leave for 15 minutes → rinse → on damp hair, apply 2 pumps of SilkSmooth Argan Oil Serum before blow-drying. Repeat the mask twice weekly for the first month.
